description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a rectangular base and a slightly angled upper section housing the display and controls. The front features a large screen with a game titled 'Stealth Fishing' and a control panel equipped with joysticks and buttons. The side panels are decorated with vibrant pixel art, including a UFO, a cat in a boat, and several fish, all set against a dynamic blue and black background with yellow highlights. The marquee at the top displays the game title in bold, stylized lettering with a moon motif. The lower front section includes a coin slot and a lockable access panel, typical of arcade machines. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and screen housing.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with vibrant pixel art side panels, a large screen, and a control panel featuring joysticks and buttons. The marquee displays 'Stealth Fishing' with a moon motif, and the front includes a coin slot.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain, solid black back panel with no visible features or artwork.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the colorful pixel art, including a UFO, a cat in a boat, and fish, set against a blue and black background.
description_view_2: The front view displays the screen with the 'Stealth Fishing' game, the control panel with joysticks and buttons, the marquee, and the coin slot.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showcasing the same vibrant pixel art and overall cabinet shape.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel typical of classic arcade cabinets
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple colored buttons arranged in a row, with a simple color scheme and no elaborate markings visible
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the game title 'STEALTH FISHING' in bold, stylized white and blue letters with a large yellow moon and a blue night sky background
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Pixel art graphics depicting a UFO, a cat in a boat, and several fish, with a blue, black, and yellow color scheme and a dynamic, retro theme
